title: John Deere Horicon Works Employees Ratify New Contract

title: John Deere Announces Request for Proposals for Satellite Communications Opportunity

title: Deere & Company: Structural Tailwinds Could Push The Stock Higher

title: Deere Board Elects Josh Jepsen as Chief Financial Officer
text: MOLINE, Ill. , Sept. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Deere & Company (NYSE: DE) announced that its Board of Directors elected Josh Jepsen, 44, as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer (CFO), effective September 16.

title: Deere names insider Joshua Jepsen as CFO
text: Agricultural equipment maker Deere & Co said on Thursday it elected Joshua Jepsen as chief financial officer, replacing Rajesh Kalathur, who will continue as president of the company's financial unit.
